summary: Banco del Baj√É¬≠o, S.A., Instituci√É¬≥n de Banca M√É¬∫ltiple provides various banking products and services in Mexico. It operates through two segments, Business Banking and Commercial Banking. The company offers deposit and saving products; short and long-term loans, mortgage loans, and personal loans; and automotive credit and credit cards. It also provide short and long-term financial products; syndicated financing services; investment products; credit and payroll advance services; financial factoring and leasing services; securities products; trust contract services; online banking services; foreign exchange services; insurance products; and point of sale terminal services. The company serves individuals, companies, corporations, governments, and small and medium enterprises, as well as agricultural and rural, and infrastructure sectors.
